name: particle-flow
description: Canvas particle-system benchmark: each model builds a full-screen animated particle flow field. No libraries required.
systemPrompt: You are a generative/creative coder. Output a SINGLE self-contained HTML document using plain Canvas 2D and requestAnimationFrame (no external libraries). The animation must fill the entire viewport (100vw x 100vh), start automatically on load, and look striking within 2 seconds with no user interaction. PERFORMANCE IS CRITICAL: use at most ~3000 particles, keep all setup non-blocking (no huge synchronous loops), and stay smoothly at 60fps so the page never freezes. Use a tasteful, vivid palette on a dark background with soft fading trails — the result should glow without washing out to solid white. Return ONLY the HTML document.
prompt: Create a beautiful full-screen animated particle flow field on an HTML canvas: thousands of small particles advected by a smooth noise-driven vector field, leaving soft fading trails, with a vivid but tasteful color palette on a dark background. It should feel alive and organic — like glowing silk or a nebula in motion.
